data.name: EnablePerClientThumbnailsLayoutsCheckBox.Text
data.value: Unique layout for each EVE client

data.name: HideThumbnailsOnLostFocusCheckBox.Text
data.value: Hide previews when EVE client is not active

data.name: CreditMaintLabel.Text
data.value: Credit to previous maintainer: Phrynohyas Tig-Rah

data.name: DocumentationLinkLabel.Text
data.value: For more information visit the forum thread:

data.name: DescriptionLabel.Text
data.value:
An advanced task switcher for EVE Online clients.
The program does NOT • modify EVE Online interface • display modified EVE Online interface • broadcast any keyboard or mouse events • interact with EVE Online except of; - resizing or bringing it to the foreground

data.name: HideActiveClientThumbnailCheckBox.Text
data.value: Hide preview of active EVE client

data.name: DocumentationLink.Text
data.value: to be set from prresenter to be set from prresenter to be set from prresenter to be set from prresenter
